assumptions: LLM fallback removal: both classify_decision_with_llm call sites in extract_decision_result are replaced with immediate ambiguous classification; the function itself stays in summarize_llm.py for manual use
Unresolvable = summarized_at IS NOT NULL AND (decision_code=other OR decisionState=unknown OR parseClass=ambiguous). Neutral (decisionState=neutral) is NOT unresolvable.
Status page warning on run detail page in web UI; shows total count plus per-model breakdown
acceptance_criteria: Run detail page shows no warning when all transcripts are resolved

parallel_analysis.note: No parallel opportunities — waves are sequential. Wave 3 depends on Wave 2 GraphQL field. Python and TypeScript changes are in separate files but must be done in order.
